2605.12462.title: Towards Affordable Energy: A Gymnasium Environment for Electric Utility Demand-Response Programs
2605.12462.paper_summary: Extreme weather and volatile wholesale electricity markets expose residential consumers to catastrophic financial risks, yet demand response at the distribution level remains an underutilized tool for grid flexibility and energy affordability. While a demand-response program can shield consumers by issuing financial credits during high-price periods, optimizing this sequential decision-making process presents a unique challenge for reinforcement learning despite the plentiful offline historical smart meter and wholesale pricing data available publicly. Offline historical data fails to capture the dynamic, interactive feedback loop between an electric utility's pricing signals and customer acceptance and adaptation to a demand-response program. To address this, we introduce DR-Gym, an open-source, online Gymnasium-compatible environment designed to train and evaluate demand-response from the electric utility's perspective. Unlike existing device-level energy simulators, our environment focuses on the market-level electric utility setting and provides a rich observational space relevant to the electric utility. The simulator additionally features a regime-switching wholesale price model calibrated to real-world extreme events, alongside physics-based building demand profiles. For our learning signal, we use a configurable, multi-objective reward function for specifying diverse learning objectives. We demonstrate through baseline strategies and data snapshots the capability of our simulator to create realistic and learnable environments.
2605.12462.paper_summary_zh: 極端天氣和波動的批發電力市場使住宅消費者面臨災難性的財務風險，然而，配電層級的需求響應仍然是一個未被充分利用的電網靈活性和能源可負擔性的工具。雖然需求響應計劃可以通過在高價期間發放財務抵免來保護消費者，但優化這一序列決策過程對於強化學習來說是一個獨特的挑戰，儘管公開可用的離線歷史智能電表和批發定價數據豐富。離線歷史數據無法捕捉電力公用事業的定價信號與客戶對需求響應計劃的接受和適應之間的動態互動反饋循環。為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了DR-Gym，一個開源的、與Gymnasium兼容的在線環境，旨在從電力公用事業的角度訓練和評估需求響應。與現有的設備級能源模擬器不同，我們的環境專注於市場級電力公用事業設置，並提供與電力公用事業相關的豐富觀察空間。模擬器還具有一個針對現實世界極端事件校準的政權轉換批發價格模型，以及基於物理的建築需求輪廓。對於我們的學習信號，我們使用可配置的多目標獎勵函數來指定多樣的學習目標。我們通過基準策略和數據快照展示了我們的模擬器創建現實且可學習環境的能力。
2605.12462.author: Jose E. Aguilar Escamilla et.al.
2605.12462.authors: Jose E. Aguilar Escamilla, Lingdong Zhou, Xiangqi Zhu, Huazheng Wang
